description: Retrieve the ATAC-seq Analysis: Chromatin Accessibility Profiling workflow validaded by the Galaxy IWC and apply it to the provided ATAC-seq dataset.

expected_outputs.description: the input format of the dataset must match the expected format for the workflow. Check the workflow documentation for the expected format.
Retrieve the last artifact generated by the workflow and check its format to ensure is correct.
Count the number of steps in the workflow and compare it to the expected number of steps (exclude the input, only tools).

legacy_experiment_outputs.input: the input format of the dataset must match the expected format for the workflow. Check the workflow documentation for the expected format.
legacy_experiment_outputs.last artifact: Retrieve the last artifact generated by the workflow and check its format to ensure is correct.
legacy_experiment_outputs.workflow steps: Count the number of steps in the workflow and compare it to the expected number of steps (exclude the input, only tools).

title: ATAC-seq Analysis: Chromatin Accessibility Profiling
workflow_hints: Use all tools necessary to perfom the ATAC-seq analysis. Use the best parameters for each tool to achieve the best result.
